results.rendered_html:
samākram 1 U.
1 To take possession of, occupy, fill; samameva samākrāṃtaṃ dvayaṃ dviradagāminā . tena siṃhāsanaṃ pitryamakhilaṃ cārimaṃḍalaṃ  R. 4. 4. 
2 To assail, conquer, subdue.
3 To tread or step upon.
